mustPass: Have a dedicated route for the organisation's support/services offering because visitors need to understand what help or activities exist.
Have a dedicated route for engagement because this industry often depends on participation, volunteering, membership or other involvement.
Use transparent trust elements appropriate for nonprofit/social work contexts, such as organisationsnummer, 90-konto and årsredovisning when available.
Keep calls to action aligned with the brief's primary CTA around registrering or interest/engagement, while still supporting contact.
Support both contact-form and newsletter-subscribe capabilities in the information architecture.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the site like a generic local service business selling bookable appointments.
Do not use donation-first structure as the only conversion path; participation and support access are equally important.
Do not imply clinical treatment, official authority decisions or guaranteed personal outcomes unless explicitly provided by the organisation.
Do not rely on vague mission language without explaining actual insatser, målgrupper and next steps.
Do not invent partner logos, certifications, member counts or impact numbers.
